summary: Dashboard displays core functionality but violates brand palette consistency rules by using generic gray/white UI instead of the required diner aesthetic for authenticated surfaces.

violations.description: Authenticated dashboard uses generic gray/white palette instead of sharing the diner brand treatment required for public routes. Background appears white/gray rather than teal #9fd8d2 or cream #fff8ea from the brand palette.

Dashboard uses neutral gray UI defaults instead of required diner palette surfaces. Primary canvas should use teal #9fd8d2 or cream #fff8ea, and cards should use cream/white variants from the declared palette.

actions: Apply diner brand palette to authenticated dashboard surfaces - use teal #9fd8d2 or cream #fff8ea for primary canvas
Update card backgrounds to use cream #fff8ea from brand palette instead of generic white
Ensure visual continuity between public marketing surfaces and authenticated dashboard experience
